Aladdin (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $355,559,216Details
International Box Office $686,566,891
Worldwide Box Office $1,042,126,107
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,158,898
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $30,400,836
Total $44,559,734
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The charming street rat Aladdin, the courageous and self-determined Princess Jasmine and the Genie who may be the key to their future.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$91,500,929 (25.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.89 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$182,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,476 opening theaters/4,476 max. theaters, 8.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $464,245,436

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 24th, 2019 (Wide) by Walt Disney
May 24th, 2019 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: May 22nd, 2019 (Wide) (Italy)
May 22nd, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
May 23rd, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
May 23rd, 2019 (Wide) (China)
May 24th, 2019 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 27th, 2019 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some action/peril.
(Rating bulletin 2573 (Cert #52084), 4/10/2019)
Running Time: 128 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Live Action Remake, Motion Capture Performance, Remake

Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

The charming street rat Aladdin, the courageous and self-determined Princess Jasmine and the Genie who may be the key to their future.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$91,500,929 (25.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.89 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$182,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,476 opening theaters/4,476 max. theaters, 8.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $464,245,436

Domestic Releases: May 24th, 2019 (Wide) by Walt Disney

MPA Rating: PG for some action/peril.
(Rating bulletin 2573 (Cert #52084), 4/10/2019)
Running Time: 128 minutes
